title: vicia japonica subsp. amurensis
intro: Vicia japonica subsp. amurensis, also known as Amur vetch or Japanese vetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vicia japonica subsp. amurensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
